commit.message:
◀▶ページナビボタンを横幅拡大

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Detect actual channel transition when frames are lost mid-buffer

The previous fix assumed frame loss only from the buffer's end (last
channel's portion). In practice, frames are lost from the MIDDLE when
the GUI blocks for display transforms and the camera deque overflows.
This shifts the channel boundary in the buffer away from the expected
planes_per_channel position, causing cross-channel data contamination
regardless of which fixed split point is used.

New approach: when a frame shortfall is detected, scan per-frame mean
intensities for the largest step-change near the expected boundary
(±30% search window, smoothed, validated against median noise). This
finds the actual ch2→ch3 transition even when frames are lost from
any position. Falls back to authoritative planes_per_channel if
detection fails (e.g., single-channel data or insufficient contrast).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Geminiプロンプトに不動産広告規制セクションを追加:
  - 絶対禁止ワード一覧（完全/激安/最高/必見/早い者勝ち等30+語）
  - 条件付き使用ルール（新築/築浅/駅近/リノベ済みの使用条件）
  - 攻めの言い換え例（激安→家賃○万円台、必見→要チェック等）
  - 徒歩分数ルール（80m=1分、端数切上、勝手な丸め禁止）
  - 賃料表示ルール（入力データそのまま使用、安く見せる加工禁止）
  - 合法テクニック（数字訴求、疑問形、限定感は物理的事実で出す）

commit.message:
feat: Electron RAG HTTP bridge for Slack bot

Slack bot now uses the full TF-IDF + graph BFS search from Rembrandt Map:
- electron/main.cjs: HTTP server on :7331, forwards rag:search IPC to renderer
- electron/preload.cjs: ragAPI (onSearch / sendResult)
- src/hooks/useRagApi.ts: handles search requests using tfidfIndex + directVaultSearch
- src/App.tsx: mount useRagApi()
- bot/modules/rag_electron.py: HTTP client calling localhost:7331
- bot/bot.py: tries Electron RAG first, falls back to simple search if app is closed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: PR #5 lessons and session close-out (#6)

* Fix mobile bottom sheet touch handling with proper approach

Root cause: iOS WebKit (all iOS browsers including Arc) routes touches
to elements with touch-action:none (set by D3 on the SVG) rather than
to visually-overlapping position:fixed elements. The previous fix
(svg.on('.zoom', null)) didn't address the root cause and also broke
map interactivity while the sheet was open.

Changes:
- CSS: position:fixed → position:absolute so iOS correctly routes
  touches to the sidebar (position:absolute inside a position:relative
  container works correctly in all WebKit versions)
- CSS: Remove ::before pseudo-element drag handle (can't receive touch
  events) and add real .sheet-handle / .sheet-handle-bar classes with
  touch-action:none
- CSS: Add .sidebar-body as the scrollable scroll container with
  touch-action:pan-y; add .dragging and .expanded modifier classes
- Template: Wrap sidebar content in .sidebar-body for the scroll layer
- JS: Remove broken svg.on('.zoom',null) approach; add setupSheetHandle()
  that injects a real DOM handle and wires touchstart/touchmove/touchend
  for drag-to-raise (expand) and drag-to-lower (close) behaviour

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix sheet drag-up expand: use max-height not translateY

Dragging up on a bottom-anchored sheet (position:absolute; bottom:0)
needs to grow the sheet's max-height to reveal more content.
Using translateY(-N) just moves the box without changing its size.

- CSS: Add max-height to the sidebar transition for smooth expand animation
- JS: touchmove UP → grow max-height inline from 55vh base toward 82vh cap
      touchmove DOWN → translateY only (slide toward close)
      touchend → snap to expanded (82vh class) / closed / default based on drag distance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: capture PR #5 lessons and close out session

- lessons.md: 5 new rules on iOS WebKit touch routing, pseudo-element
  event limitations, bottom sheet expand via max-height, CSS transition
  toggling during drag, and iOS browser engine uniformity
- todo.md: PR #5 marked complete with implementation summary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(#176): BEL + OSC 9/777 detection with notification settings toggle (#189)

Subscribe terminal.onBell and register OSC 9/777 handlers in initTerminal()
to detect terminal bell sequences. Add shouldNotify() guard (localStorage
termNotifications, Notification.permission, document.visibilityState).

Add Notifications settings section in index.html and termNotifications
toggle handler in settings.ts that requests permission on enable and reverts
if denied.

Exactly 3 files touched: terminal.ts, settings.ts, index.html.

commit.message:
feat(call): enhance Fix A/V modal with device management panel (#1202)

* feat(call): enhance Fix A/V modal with device management panel

Transform the Fix A/V modal from a diagnostic-only tool into a full
device management panel. Users can now directly pick camera/mic/speaker,
preview self-view, monitor mic levels, and test speaker output — all
mid-call. Diagnostics flow is preserved in a collapsible section.

Also adds "Change device" link to device fallback banners that opens
the Fix A/V modal directly.

Closes #1199

commit.message:
Add Firebase Auth + tier system with scan limits and feature gating

- Firebase Auth (Google + Email/Password) with ProtectedRoute
- Three tiers: Free (5 scans/month, 25 contacts), Early Access (lifetime scans, 50 contacts), Pro (unlimited)
- Firestore-backed scan counting with calendar-based monthly reset
- Access code redemption system for Early Access testers
- Feature gating: CSV/Excel/vCard export, Google Drive sync locked for free tier
- UpgradePrompt modal with inline access code input
- QR code detection in batch upload (free, no scan cost)
- Firestore security rules preventing client-side tier manipulation
- Settings page with account info, tier badge, scan usage, feature checklist

commit.message:
feat: Make reviewer spawning polling defer to workflow script (#1789)

When a workflow script exists for a PR's channel, the polling fallback
in collect_reviewer_effects_with_source now uses a 5-minute delay
(PR_REVIEW_DELAY_SCRIPT_SECS) instead of the normal 45-second delay.
This ensures the script's real-time pr.opened handler via
rpc.spawn_reviewer() is truly authoritative, with polling only acting
as a safety net for missed webhooks.

The webhook_recently_handled window also scales with the delay, extending
to 600s when a script exists (vs 90s without).

Closes !2056

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add fillable textarea with positional dot mapping and character counter

Replace static SVG letter form with interactive textarea. Dots activate
based on character positions using Range API on a mirror div (textarea-
caret-position technique). Text is positionally capped to 7 dot rows.
Counter shows plain character count without a total.

commit.message:
feat: 系统优化和测试完善 (#13)

* feat: 终端入库自动查询费率功能

实现终端批量入库时自动从支付通道查询费率信息，采用预览-确认两阶段流程。

## 功能特性
- 预览阶段：查询第一个终端费率作为样本展示
- 确认阶段：批量查询所有终端费率并保存
- 动态费率配置：使用 JSONB 支持不同通道的费率类型

## 技术实现

### 后端
- 新增 PreviewImport 接口：POST /api/v1/terminals/preview-import
- 新增 ConfirmImport 接口：POST /api/v1/terminals/confirm-import
- 新增 BatchCreatePolicies 方法：批量创建费率策略
- 新增 GenerateSNList 工具函数：SN 范围生成

### 前端
- 新增费率预览对话框（ElMessageBox）
- 动态渲染不同通道的费率类型
- 集成预览-确认入库流程

### 数据库
- 新增 terminal_policies.rate_configs 字段（JSONB）
- 创建 GIN 索引优化查询性能

## 代码质量
- 单元测试覆盖率 100%
- 消除代码重复（SN 生成逻辑）
- 修复 Nil 指针风险
- 符合 Go 代码规范

## 验证
- 后端编译通过
- 前端编译通过
- 27 项检查全部通过
- 数据库迁移已执行

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: 系统优化和测试完善

### 移动端应用 (Flutter)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Add pr.auto_merge workflow event (#1790)

Add a new `pr.auto_merge` WorkflowEvent variant that fires when a PR
is eligible for auto-merge (approved + CI green, no active reviewer).

When a workflow script exists for the PR's channel, the inline
`Effect::AutoMergePr` is replaced with `EmitWorkflowEvent(PrAutoMerge)`,
making auto-merge script-authoritative. The script can customize or
block auto-merge behavior by handling the `pr.auto_merge` event.

Changes:
- Add `PrAutoMerge` variant to `WorkflowEvent` enum (workflow.rs)
- Post-process effects in `collect_stuck_condition_effects` to replace
  `AutoMergePr` with `EmitWorkflowEvent(PrAutoMerge)` when a workflow
  script exists (pr.rs)
- Add `pr.auto-merge` RPC handler for scripts to trigger auto-merge
  (rpc.rs, rpc_prs.rs)
- Add `enable_auto_merge()` to Python SDK `MidtownRPC` (__init__.py)
- Add `pr.auto_merge` handler to `default_workflow.py`
- Add serialization, accessor, and authority tests

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(vertex): add dedicated Vertex AI driver + align retry with Gemini CLI

- Extract shared Gemini helpers to gemini_common.py (error classification,
  schema cleaning, message formatting, thinking config)
- New VertexProvider with native Vertex endpoint, per-model region,
  auto-region detection
- Refactor GoogleProvider to import from gemini_common (~400 lines removed)
- Align retry logic with Gemini CLI retryWithBackoff(): 10 attempts,
  5s initial, 30s max, +0-20%/±30% jitter, no cap on server-requested delay
- Error classification matches Gemini CLI classifyGoogleError() exactly:
  503→retryable, PerDay→terminal, G1 credits→terminal, cloudcode-pa domain
  checks, RetryInfo server delay, PerMinute→60s, 429/499 fallback
- Migration: google_cca+aiplatform URL → vertex driver automatically
- Register vertex in drivers.py, telegram.py, cmd_init.py

commit.message:
initial setup with CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add audit_log.run_id index and replace JS intent aggregation with SQL

Add missing index on audit_log.run_id to avoid full table scans when
filtering audit history by runId.

Replace the JS-side intent usage aggregation (which fetched rows and
parsed JSON in memory, silently undercounting with LIMIT 1000) with a
proper SQL GROUP BY using SQLite's json_each/json_extract. This gives
accurate counts over the full dataset without loading rows into memory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(chatbot+widget+partner): builder rewrite, widget UX, partner access fix

Chatbot Builder:
- Rewrite from React Flow to Blade+jQuery with tree branching layout
- JSON steps column replacing nodes/edges tables (migration added)
- WebsiteChatService rewritten for cursor-based step navigation
- Add Test (live widget) and Embed buttons in builder and index
- Form layout now full-width respecting platform paddings
- Remove confirm dialogs on delete actions

Widget (widget.js):
- Launcher hides when chat opens, reappears on close
- Input disabled when bot sends buttons (click-only)
- Larger chat window (380x600)
- Welcome bubble positioned left of launcher (no avatar)
- Bold text support (**text** → <strong>)

Partner/Agency Access Fix:
- Fix BelongsToTenant global scope to check session directly
  (SubstituteBindings runs before TenantMiddleware)
- Block message sending for partners (403 on WhatsApp/Instagram)
- Chat UI shows read-only notice for partner views
- Lead events prefixed with "Agência parceira:" during impersonation

commit.message:
fix(provider): Add CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE=65 for GLM-5 context degradation

- GLM-5 effective context ~130K tokens (vs 200K advertised)
- Default auto-compact triggers at 92% (184K) - too late for GLM-5
- New env var triggers auto-compact at 65% (130K tokens)
- Updated warnings section with mitigation details

Refs: #25867, GLM-5 Technical Report arXiv:2602.15763v1

commit.message:
fix: unwrap backend API response envelope in api client

The backend wraps all responses in { success, data } but the app
was reading fields directly, causing SecureStore to receive undefined
instead of a string token on login.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(cafe): image visibility, slug normalization, AI alt text, gallery dropdown

Root cause: 01_Portfolio/ uses PascalCase_Underscored names (e.g. Alps_,
Black_and_White) but images/ on the live site uses lowercase-hyphenated
slugs (alps, black-and-white). The CaFE API was using raw folder names
in thumbnail URLs → all gallery images were 404ing.

Fixes:
- Add _portfolio_to_slug() helper matching Studio's slug convention
- API now returns collection_slug + correct thumbnail_url for all photos
- Frontend uses photo.thumbnail_url (API-provided) with fallback
- Add POST /cafe/generate-metadata endpoint for AI alt text generation
- Add "Generate Alt Text" button in Submission Rack
- Add gallery dropdown for quick navigation (no more click-through-cards)

fix: siempre retornar 401 JSON en AuthenticationException (sin route login)

Multipart uploads no envían Accept: application/json, por lo que el handler
default de Laravel intenta redirect a route('login') que no existe en API-only.
Override unauthenticated() para retornar siempre JSON 401.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 証拠ベースで根本原因3つを修正（セッション741bcf71のログ・スクショ分析）

【根本原因1】_dismiss_modals の座標/JSクリックがサイドバーリンクを誤クリック
→ ダッシュボードから「LINE PRスタンプ管理」ページに意図せず遷移
証拠: debug_03_dashboard.png が LINE PRスタンプ管理ページ

修正: 各クリック後にURL変化を検証。変化があれば元URLに戻る。
座標クリック（方法4）を削除。JS方法はhrefなし要素のみに限定。

【根本原因2】スタンプタイプ選択が「LINE PRスタンプ」サイドバーリンクを先にマッチ
→ a[href] DOM順検索でサイドバーが本体ボタンより先にヒット
→ href に "sticker" 含む promotion/stickers が includes('sticker')=true
証拠: debug_05_after_sticker_select.png が LINE PRスタンプ管理ページ

修正: text === 'スタンプ' の完全一致に変更。
promotion/guideline/review/stats を含む href を除外。
button 要素も検索対象に追加。誤遷移検知で go_back()。

【根本原因3】_click_new_registration の el.click() が SPA で遷移しない場合がある
→ page.goto(href) に変更（最優先戦略）
→ 各戦略後に URL 変化を検証し、変化なしなら次の戦略へ
証拠: 新規登録の実際 href = /my/{userId}/create（ログから確定）

【その他】ログバッファ 20→100 に拡張（中間ログ消失防止）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: complete Phase III/IV — Ch 2-7 drafts, references, word count audit

Add 6 thesis chapters completing the dissertation draft:
- Ch 2: Literature Review (15,535 words, 8 sections across 7 traditions)
- Ch 3: Methodology (8,713 words, DSR framework + 9 formal definitions)
- Ch 4: Results (5,031 words, 9 theorems in unified narrative)
- Ch 5: Discussion (9,649 words, RQ1-RQ5 + limitations + future work)
- Ch 6: References (100 APA 7th formatted entries)
- Ch 7: Appendices (7,982 words, A-H: algorithms, schema, API, gates, tests, taxonomy, FSMs, HVCS)

Merge literature review halves into single file, remove temp parts.
Update plan: Phase III+IV complete, 9/10 quality gates PASS (58,010 words).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 全面修正信用卡回饋邏輯與資料正確性

- 修正 Costco 線上/實體均封鎖（僅限富邦聯名卡）
- 修正保費推薦：改為樂行卡 3.5%（原為 Bankee 1.2%）
- 修正 eTag儲值、停車場、捷運 錯誤給予 3% 回饋
- 修正 "ok"/"NET"/"學校"/"保險" 等關鍵字過廣誤判問題
- 修正 Gemini API 永遠不會呼叫的邏輯死角
- 新增 Uber 模糊偵測：叫車(4%) vs Uber Eats(0.5%) 二選一 UI
- 新增外送平台(Foodpanda/Uber Eats)明確 0.5% 本地處理
- 新增汽修/保養通路：樂行卡 2% 回饋
- 新增備選方案卡片：Bankee 1.2% 附帶不符合門檻時替代方案
- 擴充樂家+卡 4% 通路：健身/書店/共享出行/更多量販
- 補充快樂信用卡：巨城、遠企購物中心
- 頂級快樂卡加入月累計說明提醒
- 保費回饋封頂後顯示實際利率而非標稱 3.5%
- 知識庫全面更新：正確說明各通路規則與門檻

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
